title: COVID-19 Drugs and vaccines - Canada.ca
content:
## COVID-19 Drugs and vaccines
Information for drug and vaccine manufacturers in relation to COVID-19

## Services and information

### About drugs and vaccines
Regulatory response, developing drugs and vaccines, special access program, who to contact
Authorized vaccines, types of vaccines, on-going safety monitoring
Authorized treatments, types of treatments, drugs, biologics, plasma, on-going safety monitoring
Conducting a clinical trial related to COVID-19, authorized clinical trials in Canada

### Authorizing drugs and vaccines
About market authorization, information for applicants, list of applications received, list of authorized drugs and vaccines

### Exceptional import and sale of drugs
How to import, list of designated drugs, tier 3 drug shortages, who to contact

### International engagement
International vaccine and treatment development, addressing drug and medical device shortages, collaboration

### Importing and exporting designated drugs
Border import and export requirements

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
